001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity;
002
003import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
004import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
005import androidx.room.ColumnInfo;
006import androidx.room.Entity;
007import androidx.room.ForeignKey;
008import androidx.room.Index;
009import androidx.room.PrimaryKey;
010import java.time.Instant;
011
012/**
013 * Represents a candling observation recorded for a specific egg.
014 *
015 * <p>Each observation stores the day of incubation, a development status,
016 * optional notes, and the time the observation was recorded.
017 */
018@Entity(
019    tableName = "candling_observation",
020    foreignKeys = {
021        @ForeignKey(
022            entity = Egg.class,
023            parentColumns = "egg_id",
024            childColumns = "egg_id",
025            onDelete = ForeignKey.CASCADE
026        )
027
028    },
029    indices = {
030        @Index(value = {"egg_id"}),
031    }
032)
033public class CandlingObservation {
034
035  @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate = true)
036  @ColumnInfo(name = "observation_id")
037  private long id;
038
039  @ColumnInfo(name = "egg_id")
040  private long eggId;
041
042  @ColumnInfo(name = "day_number")
043  private int dayNumber;
044
045  @ColumnInfo(name = "development_status")
046  @Nullable
047  private String developmentStatus;
048
049  @ColumnInfo(name = "notes")
050  @Nullable
051  private String notes;
052
053  @SuppressWarnings("NotNullFieldNotInitialized")
054  @ColumnInfo(name = "timestamp")
055  @NonNull
056  private Instant timestamp;
057
058  /**
059   * Returns the unique ID of this observation.
060   *
061   * @return observation ID.
062   */
063  public long getId() {
064    return id;
065  }
066
067  /**
068   * Sets the unique ID of this observation.
069   *
070   * @param id observation ID.
071   */
072  public void setId(long id) {
073    this.id = id;
074  }
075
076  /**
077   * Returns the ID of the egg associated with this observation.
078   *
079   * @return related egg ID.
080   */
081  public long getEggId() {
082    return eggId;
083  }
084
085  /**
086   * Sets the ID of the egg associated with this observation.
087   *
088   * @param eggId related egg ID.
089   */
090  public void setEggId(long eggId) {
091    this.eggId = eggId;
092  }
093
094  /**
095   * Returns the day number of incubation for this observation.
096   *
097   * @return incubation day number.
098   */
099  public int getDayNumber() {
100    return dayNumber;
101  }
102
103  /**
104   * Sets the day number of incubation for this observation.
105   *
106   * @param dayNumber incubation day number.
107   */
108  public void setDayNumber(int dayNumber) {
109    this.dayNumber = dayNumber;
110  }
111
112  /**
113   * Returns the recorded development status for the egg.
114   *
115   * @return development status, or {@code null} if not specified.
116   */
117  @Nullable
118  public String getDevelopmentStatus() {
119    return developmentStatus;
120  }
121
122  /**
123   * Sets the recorded development status for the egg.
124   *
125   * @param developmentStatus development status, or {@code null}.
126   */
127  public void setDevelopmentStatus(@Nullable String developmentStatus) {
128    this.developmentStatus = developmentStatus;
129  }
130
131  /**
132   * Returns any notes recorded for this observation.
133   *
134   * @return observation notes, or {@code null} if none were recorded.
135   */
136  @Nullable
137  public String getNotes() {
138    return notes;
139  }
140
141  /**
142   * Sets the notes recorded for this observation.
143   *
144   * @param notes observation notes, or {@code null}.
145   */
146  public void setNotes(@Nullable String notes) {
147    this.notes = notes;
148  }
149
150  /**
151   * Returns the timestamp when this observation was recorded.
152   *
153   * @return observation timestamp.
154   */
155  @NonNull
156  public Instant getTimestamp() {
157    return timestamp;
158  }
159
160  /**
161   * Sets the timestamp when this observation was recorded.
162   *
163   * @param timestamp observation timestamp.
164   */
165  public void setTimestamp(@NonNull Instant timestamp) {
166    this.timestamp = timestamp;
167  }
168}
